name: UPDATECLICS_001_01
definition:
CREATE PROCEDURE UPDATECLICS_001_01
AS
DECLARE @CEKREP FLOAT
DECLARE @KC FLOAT
DECLARE @PS FLOAT
DECLARE @REPKC FLOAT
DECLARE @REPPS FLOAT
DECLARE @NUMSREF INT
DECLARE @CEKREF INT
DECLARE @CLREF  INT
DECLARE @DOC INT
DECLARE @RISKSTATUS INT
DECLARE @PREVST INT
DECLARE @CLCIRO INT
DECLARE @RISKCEK FLOAT
DECLARE @REPRISKCEK FLOAT
DECLARE @RISKCEKC FLOAT
DECLARE @REPRISKCEKC FLOAT
DECLARE @DEVIR INT
DECLARE @REPNET FLOAT
DECLARE @CEKAMNT FLOAT
DECLARE @UPDAMNT INT
DECLARE @RISKCOLLATRL FLOAT
DECLARE @REPRISKCOLLATRL FLOAT
DECLARE @NEWRISKCEK FLOAT
DECLARE @NEWREPRISKCEK FLOAT
DECLARE @NEWRISKCEKC FLOAT
DECLARE @NEWREPRISKCEKC FLOAT
DECLARE @REPNEWRISKCEKC FLOAT
DECLARE @COLLATRLREF INT
set NOCOUNT ON
UPDATE LG_001_01_CLRNUMS
SET MYCSRISKTOTAL=0, REPMYCSRISKTOTAL=0,
    CSTCSRISKTOTAL=0, REPCSTCSRISKTOTAL=0
WHERE CLCARDREF > 0
DECLARE CURS CURSOR FOR
SELECT LOGICALREF
FROM LG_001_01_CSTRANS WHERE CSREF IN (SELECT CSREF FROM LG_001_01_CSTRANS
WHERE CARDMD=5 AND CARDREF >= 0)
ORDER BY CSREF ,STATNO DESC
   OPEN CURS
   FETCH NEXT FROM CURS
   INTO @CEKREF
   WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
   BEGIN
     BEGIN TRANSACTION
 EXECUTE CLCSRISK_001_01 @CEKREF,@CLREF OUTPUT,@CLCIRO OUTPUT,@RISKCEK OUTPUT,@REPRISKCEK OUTPUT,@RISKCEKC OUTPUT,@REPRISKCEKC OUTPUT,
 @NUMSREF OUTPUT,@KC OUTPUT,@PS OUTPUT,@REPKC OUTPUT,@REPPS OUTPUT,@DOC OUTPUT,@RISKSTATUS OUTPUT,@PREVST OUTPUT,@DEVIR OUTPUT,@CEKAMNT OUTPUT,
 @CEKREP OUTPUT, @UPDAMNT OUTPUT, @RISKCOLLATRL OUTPUT, @REPRISKCOLLATRL OUTPUT, @COLLATRLREF OUTPUT,@NEWRISKCEK OUTPUT,@NEWREPRISKCEK OUTPUT,@NEWRISKCEKC OUTPUT,@NEWREPRISKCEKC OUTPUT
 IF @DOC IN (1,2)
         BEGIN
              SELECT @NEWRISKCEK    = @NEWRISKCEK * -1
              SELECT @NEWREPRISKCEK = @NEWREPRISKCEK * -1
              IF @RISKSTATUS = 1
               BEGIN
                  UPDATE LG_001_01_CLRNUMS
                     SET CSTCSRISKTOTAL = CSTCSRISKTOTAL + @NEWRISKCEK,
                         REPCSTCSRISKTOTAL = REPCSTCSRISKTOTAL + @NEWREPRISKCEK
                         WHERE LOGICALREF = @NUMSREF AND CLCARDREF >= 0
               END
              ELSE
        BEGIN
                     SELECT @RISKCEK    = @RISKCEK * -1
                     SELECT @REPRISKCEK = @REPRISKCEK * -1
              SELECT @RISKCEKC = @RISKCEKC * -1
                     SELECT @REPRISKCEKC = @REPRISKCEKC * -1
                     IF @RISKSTATUS = 8 AND @PREVST IN (1,2,4,3,5,11,12)
               BEGIN
                 SELECT @RISKCEK = @RISKCEK * -1
                      SELECT @REPRISKCEK = @REPRISKCEK * -1
                     SELECT @RISKCEKC = @RISKCEKC * -1
                     SELECT @REPRISKCEKC = @REPRISKCEKC * -1
                            UPDATE LG_001_01_CLRNUMS
                            SET CSTCSRISKTOTAL = CSTCSRISKTOTAL + @NEWRISKCEK,
                                REPCSTCSRISKTOTAL = REPCSTCSRISKTOTAL + @NEWREPRISKCEK
                            WHERE LOGICALREF = @NUMSREF AND CLCARDREF >= 0
                      END
              ELSE
                      BEGIN
                        IF @RISKSTATUS = 6 AND @PREVST = 1
                  BEGIN
                 SELECT @NEWRISKCEK    = @NEWRISKCEK * -1
                            SELECT @NEWREPRISKCEK = @NEWREPRISKCEK * -1
                            UPDATE LG_001_01_CLRNUMS
                            SET CSTCSRISKTOTAL = CSTCSRISKTOTAL + @NEWRISKCEK,
                                REPCSTCSRISKTOTAL = REPCSTCSRISKTOTAL + @NEWREPRISKCEK
                                WHERE LOGICALREF = @NUMSREF AND CLCARDREF >= 0
                         END
                        ELSE
                         BEGIN
                            UPDATE LG_001_01_CLRNUMS
                            SET MYCSRISKTOTAL = MYCSRISKTOTAL + @NEWRISKCEK,
                                REPMYCSRISKTOTAL = REPMYCSRISKTOTAL + @NEWREPRISKCEK
                            WHERE LOGICALREF = @NUMSREF AND CLCARDREF >= 0
                         END
                      END
               END
          END
 IF @DOC IN (3,4)
          BEGIN
         SELECT @NEWRISKCEK = @NEWRISKCEK
                SELECT @NEWREPRISKCEK = @NEWREPRISKCEK
         SELECT @NEWRISKCEKC = @NEWRISKCEKC
         SELECT @NEWREPRISKCEKC = @NEWREPRISKCEKC
                UPDATE LG_001_01_CLRNUMS
         SET MYCSRISKTOTAL = MYCSRISKTOTAL + @NEWRISKCEK,
             REPMYCSRISKTOTAL = REPMYCSRISKTOTAL + @NEWREPRISKCEK
                WHERE LOGICALREF = @NUMSREF AND CLCARDREF >= 0
   END
 IF (@PREVST = 2) AND (@CLCIRO <> 0) AND (@CLCIRO <> @CLREF)
  BEGIN
     SELECT @NEWRISKCEKC = @NEWRISKCEKC * -1
     SELECT @REPNEWRISKCEKC = @REPNEWRISKCEKC * -1
     UPDATE LG_001_01_CLRNUMS
        SET CSTCSRISKTOTAL = CSTCSRISKTOTAL + @NEWRISKCEK,
                   REPCSTCSRISKTOTAL = REPCSTCSRISKTOTAL + @NEWREPRISKCEK
           WHERE CLCARDREF = @CLCIRO AND CLCARDREF >= 0
  END
 COMMIT TRANSACTION
    FETCH NEXT FROM CurS
    INTO @CEKREF
  END
CLOSE CurS
DEALLOCATE CurS
